evidence.text: Title: How to create a culture of experimentation in product teams URL Source: https://mixpanel.com/blog/culture-of-experimentation/ Published Time: 2025-03-28T19:26:39.000Z Markdown Content: Creating a culture of experimentation across your company promotes data-driven decision-making and prevents teams from relying on assumptions. When your product managers, engineers, and growth teams are encouraged to experiment—and given the tools and resources to do so—you promote innovation through continuous iteration. Have you ever seen a product team make a major product change based on nothing but vibes? To be fair, we usually call vibes
